description_long: This object consists of a set of five goblet-shaped cups arranged around a central, slightly taller bottle or vase. All pieces are made from a material resembling aged ivory or bone, with a matte, slightly yellowed surface and subtle patina indicating age. The central vase has a rounded body, a narrow neck, and a small lip, while the cups have wide bowls and short stems with circular bases. Some of the cups display faint, worn inscriptions or labels, adding a sense of historical or decorative value. The set appears to be utilitarian but also ornamental, likely intended for display or ceremonial use. The overall appearance is cohesive, with all pieces sharing similar coloration and finish.
description: A set of five ivory-toned goblets and a central bottle with a matte, aged finish and faint inscriptions, arranged in a decorative grouping.
description_view_0: Front view showing the central bottle flanked by five goblets, with inscriptions visible on the nearest cup.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the rounded shape of the bottle and the uniform arrangement of the goblets.
description_view_2: Rear view with the bottle's neck and back sides of the goblets visible, inscriptions less prominent.
description_view_3: Side view emphasizing the circular arrangement and the consistent color and finish of all pieces.
